name: Bitcoin CLI Commands
tagline: Interactive reference directory for 152 Bitcoin CLI commands
description: A searchable, interactive reference for Bitcoin Core CLI commands built as a companion tool for the b4os.dev course. Features a sortable data table with 152 commands, real-time search across names and descriptions, pagination, and direct links to chainquery.com documentation for each command.
highlights: 152 Bitcoin CLI commands with descriptions and argument details
Real-time search filtering across command names and descriptions
Sortable and paginated data table with TanStack Table
Direct links to external documentation on chainquery.com
